title: LightRumFermentBrunch
description: A garlicky, gooey Algerian dish with a touch of light rum and ferment for a unique brunch experience.

ingredients.name: Ferment mixture (instructions provided)
ingredients.notes: Use a commercial product or make your own with ingredients like apple cider vinegar and water

instructions: Toast the bread to desired crispiness.
Mix garlic puree, peanut butter, almond milk, vanilla extract, salt, and pepper in a bowl until smooth.
Drizzle light rum over the toast slices. Allow it to drip off for a slightly boozy effect (if not using light rum).
Dip each toast slice into the peanut butter mixture, pressing gently to coat evenly.
Serve immediately with extra peanut butter and light rum on the side if desired.
